titleStmt.title: SII 30.82: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 82. (A.R. No. 159 of 1915.) Mallasamudram, Tiruchchengodu Taluk, Salem District Chōḻēśvara temple-on Detached stones built into the east, North and south walls of the same shrine and the maṇḍapa in front of it. Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: . 8: 11th c. A.D.

summary.p: Fragmentary. Stones are not in order. It begins with the eulogy of Rājēndra I. It is in many pieces built into the wall. probably belonged to one and the same temple, Ulagaḷandāṉ Viṇṇagar of Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḷapuram. It appears a gift was made for the food offerings to the deity (Āḷvār) of Ulagaḷandāṉ viṇṇagar by the nagarattār of Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻapuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi ṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭarava
ṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻ keḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavarpakkal teṉṉa
vaṉ vaitta cun=tara ñ caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅ kāval
palpaḻan=ti vuñ ceruvi ḷitta jayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu
piṭiliyiraṭṭapāṭi ye vaneti yum pācaṭaip paḻaṇa mācuṇi tecamum Āti na
karavaiyiṟ cantiraṉ ṟolkulattin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamar kaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup pala tanattoṭu niṟai kulatanak ku
n=tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṇai kirttit takkaṇalāṭamuṅ
mayilvāḷaṉai veñcamar viḷākat taiñcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal(la) yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilaneṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamu
m vicaiyuttuṅka panmanākiya kaṭārattaraiyaṉai vākaiyum porukaṭaṟ kumpak kariyoṭakappaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetippiṟakka
ṇipputavamuṅ kanamaṇikka niṟaicīr vicaiyamun=tuṟai nirppanṉaiyum manmalaiyūraiyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ cūḻ māyiripa
māvalipaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūruṅ kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamu titamar valvinai mātamaā liṅkamu kalāmutir kaṭun=tiṟa

taṉperun teviya(r)rāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiyalūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟai ṉāṭun tuṭar vaṉavelip
paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷicūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkamum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamu
m porukaṭalīḻattaraicar tammuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar
pakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cuntara muṭiyum Intiraṉāramun teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇ
ṭalamuḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya pa

veṟimalar tīrtteṟivaṉa kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celuttic
porukaṭal kumpak kariyoṭum Akappaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetip piṟa

moyttoḷir puṉamaṇipputavamum kaṉamaṇik katavamum niṟaicīr vicaiya
māpappāḷamuṅ kāvalampuricai mevilimpaṅkamum viḷaippantūruṭai vaḷaippantūrum
vāramun toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarākiya
ṅkoṇṭa coḻapurattu nakarattom Ivvūr Ulakaḷan=tān viṇṇaka rāḻvār koyilil
ttāl Arici munnāḻi tiruvamirtāy varutalil trisan=ti mūṉṟukkum Orusa ṅkattāl Ari
mākak koṇṭu nivantañ ceytu kuṭuttom mutalikaippa

ṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamu
ḻa māyiriṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkā
kalāmutir kaṭuntiṟal nilā
ṭṭu munnai vallavarai
ḻiyum Orupotaikku A
kkolāl nilam pan
Digital edition of SII 30.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
